action.reasoning: Observation: Current best test accuracy 0.7238 with ConvNeXt Tiny + cleanlab cleaning + mixup + SWA. Val accuracy 96% but huge test gap suggests severe overfitting to cleaned subset or poor cleaning. The OOF probability estimation may be insufficient (only 10 epochs per fold). Analysis: (1) Cleaning might keep too few easy samples causing overfitting. (2) Noise‑robust losses like Generalized Cross Entropy (GCE) can directly train on full noisy data with mixup, avoiding the OOF step entirely and potentially improving generalization. This also saves time. Decision: Replace cleaning pipeline with a simple GCE‑based training loop on all data, with mixup, SWA, and ConvNeXt Tiny. Train for 60 epochs and submit eval to measure improvement.
